settings.eyebrow: Botanical precision · Clinically dosed · South African
settings.heading:
Vivid by nature.
Verified by science.
settings.lede: Plant-first formulations with the milligrams on the bottle — the way it should have always been. Blended in Centurion since 1996.

settings.heading: Because the milligrams should be on the label.
settings.lede: The supplement aisle runs on proprietary blends, vague claims, and powders relabelled three times before they reach you. Vivid is what we wished existed when we started Onelife in 1996. Three things we'll never stop doing differently.

settings.heading: We put the dose on the bottle.
settings.body: A "proprietary blend" is just a confession. Every Vivid label tells you the exact milligrams of every active. If a study used 810mg, ours has 810mg. The numbers are right there, where they belong.

settings.heading: Plants first. Always.
settings.body: Whole-plant extracts where they work. Standardised actives where they're needed. Vegetable capsules, every time. Nothing imported in bulk and relabelled with a South African flag.

settings.heading: One bottle, one job.
settings.body: Fifty-two formulations, fifty-two specific outcomes. No hero ingredients chasing a trend. No "everything wellness." Built for the work, picked for the result you can actually feel.

settings.heading: Pick the system you're working on.
settings.lead: Eight focused ranges. Tap one to see the formulations made for it.

settings.heading: The ones our customers come back for.
We don't believe in fairy dusting.
settings.body:
Every Vivid formulation states the milligrams. If a study used 810mg of MSM, our MSM capsule has 810mg. If saw palmetto needs a 4:1 extract to do anything, that's what's in the bottle.

"The dose makes the medicine. Everything else is marketing copy."

settings.heading: Three stacks, built for outcomes.
settings.lead: We paired the formulations. Your body figures out the rest. R110–R150 less than buying separately.

settings.heading: Get the field notes.
settings.body: Monthly long-form on single ingredients, formulation choices, and what we're testing next. No discount alerts, no "wellness trends" — just the work. Subscribers get 10% off their first order.
settings.tiny: No spam · Unsubscribe in one click · POPIA-compliant
